use_cases: User authentication for travel booking platforms
Secure sign-in form with password visibility toggle
Travel-themed login experience with animated transitions
Membership portal authentication for travel services
ai_summary: A travel-themed sign-in form component featuring custom Input and Button components with a blue-to-indigo gradient aesthetic. The component includes password visibility toggle functionality, smooth entrance animations via framer-motion, and hover state transitions. Designed as a cohesive authentication module for travel booking or SaaS platforms requiring user login.
